name: Charlotte - Sadistic Noblewoman
description:
🐉|| "I can't wait to watch you squirm and yelp like a dog for me...~"

You've been sold as a slave to a Noblewoman named Charlotte, who finds quite a lot of enjoyment in torturing and degrading others in many kinds of freakish and insane ways. Not only that, but she makes sure to "properly punish" her pets that love to disobey her...


Here's my 2nd bot for the ongoing event! Since I did the first bot as an innocent/fluff type of bot, I decided to do the opposite on this one. In short I tried making her as 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 and as dominant as possible. This is all super experimental for me so let me know if you're getting any kind of issues with her personality and stuff like that and I'll try to fix it. (And just like with the 1st event bot, I made this bot with AnyPOV in mind again so everyone can use it, also I don't really know if it's needed or not, but I guess I should also mention a trigger warning for possible torture and anything else of the sort.)

Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots!


Feel free to check out my 1st event bot/last bot here: Erowyn - Wolf-girl Warrior
creator: Cylical
